humanRequest.source: Human request or approved change node seed

policySnapshot.source: Compiler boundary, check, evidence, risk, and stop policies

evidenceIndex.source: Existing validator, E2E, health, and evidence artifacts

targetScopeCandidates.source: Graph-derived candidate scopes before contract compilation

outputRequirementSources.source: Graph, policy, Evidence, check, and diff bindings that define output reporting obligations

stopConditionSources.source: Policy, validator, and compiler-status bindings that define dry-run stop conditions

riskSources.source: Graph, Evidence, context, policy, and scope bindings that define known risk obligations

nonExecutionStatement: This input model schema validates Actual Contract Compiler inputs only and does not compile execution contracts, execute AI, apply graph deltas, accept work, enable required checks, or retire tree-native artifacts.
